name: fine_tuning_job_create
description: Create a fine-tuning job to customize a model with your training data.

parameters.name: training_file
parameters.description: The ID of an uploaded file containing training data (JSONL format).

parameters.name: validation_file
parameters.description: The ID of an uploaded validation data file.

parameters.name: hyperparameters
parameters.description: Hyperparameters for fine-tuning: n_epochs, batch_size, learning_rate_multiplier.

parameters.name: suffix
parameters.description: A string of up to 18 characters added to the fine-tuned model name.
